title: Spy this am
author: MarketStructureGuy
selftext: SPY just printed a sharp reversal at Friday's close, dropping from $725 to $720 with elevated selling volume, and pre-market is gapping down to $717. The bigger trend is still bullish, but short-term momentum flipped negative going into Monday's open. This is a reaction setup — not a prediction. Watch the first 15 minutes after open, no entries in the first 3 (rule). If SPY reclaims $718 with confirmation structure on the 5m or 15m, calls back to $720 and $722 are the bounce play. If it loses $716 and can't reclaim, puts targeting $714 and $712 are the breakdown play. If it just chops between $716 and $720 with no clean structure, stay out — there's no edge in chop. The market tells you which scenario is real. You react, you don't guess. ⚡ #MIOS #SPY #DayTrading #OptionsTrading
